IRIS-HEP Events


Events that IRIS-HEP team members are involved in organizing, planning to participate in or otherwise interested in:

July, 2021
  • 5 Jul - 9 Jul, 2021 - PyHEP 2021 Workshop (Online)
May, 2021
  • 21 May - 21 May, 2021 - Dask in High-Energy Physics community workshop at Dask Distributed Summit 2021 (Online)
  • 15 May - 16 May, 2021 - Arduino Micro Controller and C++ programming (STEM Teachers) (University of Puerto Rico Mayaguez (UPRM))
  • 5 May, 2021 - Virtual Meeting on Virtual Meetings (Zoom (Day 1), Gather.Town (Day 2))
March, 2021
  • 1 Mar - 5 Mar, 2021 - OSG All-Hands Meeting 2021 (Online)
February, 2021
  • 16 Feb - 20 Feb, 2021 - GitHub CI/CD Training (Online)
  • 13 Feb - 14 Feb, 2021 - Machine Learning Basics for STEM teachers (Online (UPRM))
  • 12 Feb - 14 Feb, 2021 - Machine Learning Basics for STEM teachers (Virtual)
January, 2021
  • 18 Jan - 22 Jan, 2021 - C++ Course and Hands-on Training (Virtual)
December, 2020
  • 11 Dec - 11 Dec, 2020 - Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop (Virtual) (Abstract deadline: 02 October 2020)
  • 4 Dec, 2020 - Portable Inference (Zoom)
November, 2020
  • 30 Nov - 3 Dec, 2020 - Fast Machine Learning for Science Workshop (Virtual) (Abstract deadline: 30 October 2020)
  • 19 Nov - 24 Nov, 2020 - HSF WLCG Virtual Workshop (Virtual) (Abstract deadline: 23 October 2020)
  • 2 Nov - 9 Nov, 2020 - ML + GPU Training (Online)
  • 2 Nov - 6 Nov, 2020 - Tools for High Energy Physics and Cosmology (IP2I, Lyon)
October, 2020
  • 26 Oct, 2020 - Future Analysis Systems and Facilities (Zoom)
  • 19 Oct - 22 Oct, 2020 - 4th IML Machine Learning Workshop (Virtual)
  • 12 Oct - 16 Oct, 2020 - C++ Course and Hands-on Training (Virtual)
  • 6 Oct - 8 Oct, 2020 - LLVM Developers Meeting (Virtual)
August, 2020
  • 24 Aug - 28 Aug, 2020 - US-ATLAS Computing Bootcamp 2020 (Online)
July, 2020
  • 27 Jul - 30 Jul, 2020 - Virtual Docker Training (Online)
  • 22 Jul, 2020 - Sustainable Software in HEP (Zoom)
  • 15 Jul - 16 Jul, 2020 - UPRM STEM K-12 Workshop 2020 (University of Puerto Rico Mayagüez)
  • 13 Jul - 17 Jul, 2020 - PyHEP 2020 Workshop (Online)
June, 2020
  • 20 Jun - 20 Jun, 2020 - STEM. IRIS Quarknet UPRM June 2020 (Zoom) (University of Puerto Rico Mayagüez)
  • 2 Jun - 4 Jun, 2020 - Virtual Pipelines Training (Virtual)
May, 2020
  • 26 May - 29 May, 2020 - IRIS-HEP Full Team Retreat (Zoom)
  • 25 May - 29 May, 2020 - ACTS Tracking for HEP Workshop (DESY (Hamburg, Germany))
April, 2020
  • 22 Apr - 24 Apr, 2020 - Connecting the Dots 2020 (Princeton University)
February, 2020
  • 20 Feb, 2020 - Training Blueprint Meeting (Virtual) (Virtual)
  • 17 Feb - 19 Feb, 2020 - Analysis Preservation Bootcamp (CERN)
January, 2020
  • 15 Jan - 17 Jan, 2020 - ML4Jets2020 (New York University)
December, 2019
  • 13 Dec - 14 Dec, 2019 - Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences at NeurIPS 2019 (Vancouver Convention Centre)
November, 2019
  • 27 Nov - 29 Nov, 2019 - Software Carpentry Training at CERN (CERN)
  • 20 Nov - 23 Nov, 2019 - Latin American Workshop on Software and Computing (S&C) Challenges in High-Energy Particle Physics (HEP) (Instituto Politécnico Nacional (Mexico City, Mexico))
October, 2019
  • 23 Oct, 2019 - A Coordinated Ecosystem for HL-LHC Computing R&D (Catholic University of America)
  • 23 Oct - 25 Oct, 2019 - Blueprint: A Coordinated Ecosystem for HL-LHC Computing R&D (Catholic University of America, Washington DC)
  • 16 Oct - 18 Oct, 2019 - PyHEP 2019 Workshop (The Cosener's House, Abingdon, UK)
September, 2019
  • 12 Sep - 13 Sep, 2019 - IRIS-HEP - Institute Retreat (Fermilab)
  • 10 Sep, 2019 - Fast Machine Learning (Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory)
  • 10 Sep - 11 Sep, 2019 - Blueprint: Accelerated Machine Learning and Inference (Fermilab)
August, 2019
  • 19 Aug - 23 Aug, 2019 - ATLAS Software Carpentries Training (LBNL)
July, 2019
  • 29 Jul, 2019 - IRIS-HEP Tutorial: Fast columnar data analysis with data science tools (Northeastern University / APS DPF 2019)
  • 22 Jul - 26 Jul, 2019 - CoDaS-HEP 2019 (Princeton University)
  • 15 Jul - 26 Jul, 2019 - 1st Real Time Analysis Workshop (Institut Pascal)
  • 1 Jul - 2 Jul, 2019 - TrackML Challenge: Grand Finale (CERN)
June, 2019
  • 21 Jun, 2019 - Analysis Systems R&D on Scalable Platforms (NYU)
  • 21 Jun - 22 Jun, 2019 - Blueprint: Analysis Systems R&D on Scalable Platforms (NYU)
  • 19 Jun - 20 Jun, 2019 - Analysis Systems Topical Workshop (NYU)
  • 10 Jun, 2019 - FIRST-HEP/ATLAS Software Training (Argonne National Lab)
  • 3 Jun - 4 Jun, 2019 - An introduction to programming for STEM teachers (University of Puerto Rico at Mayaguez)
May, 2019

April, 2019

  • 1 Apr - 2 Apr, 2019 - Software Carpentry Workshop (FNAL)
March, 2019
  • 18 Mar - 22 Mar, 2019 - Joint HSF/OSG/WLCG Workshop (HOW2019) (Thomas Jefferson National Accelerator Facility)
January, 2019

December, 2017

  • 5 Jun - 6 Jun, 2017 - CWP Event Processing Frameworks Workshop (FNAL)

  • 8 May - 12 Jun, 2017 - DS@HEP 2017 (Data Science in High Energy Physics) (FNAL)
  • 1 May - 3 May, 2017 - 2nd S2I2 HEP/CS Workshop (Princeton University)
March, 2017
  • 28 Mar - 30 Mar, 2017 - CWP Visualization Workshop (CERN)
  • 23 Mar, 2017 - Community White Paper Follow-up at FNAL (FNAL)
  • 20 Mar - 22 Mar, 2017 - IML Topical Machine Learning Workshop (CERN)
  • 9 Mar, 2017 - Software Triggers and Event Reconstruction CWP WG meeting (LAL-Orsay (France))
